title: Player Trade - Secure Trading Between Players
description: This is a simple mod that provides a GUI for exchanging items. Now supports commands and configuration!
body:
## Player Trade

Safely and securely exchange items between two players. Just right click each other (make sure both participants have an empty hand) and the GUI opens up. 

Click the "Ready" button (symbol of cross-arrows) in the middle to indicate you've locked in your side of the trade, and when both players do so the trade will be complete. 

New in 1.20.1-b, added support for:

- Optional ability to use /trade <playername> commands from infinite range (Server Configurable, disabled by default)
- Optional ability to disable the right-click to trade functionality. (Server configurable.)
- An optional new customizable hotkey to trade with a player you're looking at.

 

Default Configuration file:


```
["Player Trade Common Configs"]  
 #Whether the /playertrade <playername> command, which allows for infinite range trading, should work or not. (Server authoritative; Requires restart.)  
 "Enable Command Trading" = true  
 #Whether right-clicking another player with an empty hand should send a trade request (Server authoritative)  
 "Enable Empty Hand Trading" = false 
```
